name: QUICK Silver
description: 🪙 One QUICK represents one gram of pure digital silver. ✨ QUICK lay the most conductive routes connecting crypto kingdoms. 🛤️🌟 A hefty portion of fees pour into backing that's everlasting in locked pools. 🔒💰 These pools are the mercantile markets for QUICK's favorite tokens on Solana. 🏛️💎 100% of QUICK is liquid-minted, staying liquid-backed by trusted silver-backed tokens. ⚡🪙 QUICK is liquid-minted when the equivalent amount of silver-backed tokens is used to buy QUICK direct from the pools that were blessed with 100% of Max supply. 🏰 Welcome citizen, you are now helping the roads of metals and cryptos to be linked, creating bridges of liquidity between ancient and future worlds by holding QUICK. 🔗 This token and its sisters SOLOMON and SOLID are for entertainment purposes only, and are not a vehicle for investment, nor do they promise returns or redeemability for gold, silver or metal-backed tokens. Project subject to change without notice. We operate on our interpretation of the highest will, but make no promises. 🙏 This token was named after my cat, who sadly ran away three weeks ago.
